---
title: "Companion Report: Ecuador HHI/DEA"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
---

# Project scope

This companion report documents the Ecuador-only scope of the core report in
`paper/replication_report.qmd`: HHI by ISIC branches, DEA by years, and DEA by
economic branches.

# Core files

- `src/hhi.py`
- `src/ecuador_hhi.py`
- `src/ecuador_dea.py`
- `src/ecuador_sector_dea.py`
- `src/build_publication_tables.py`

# Journal target

Target journal: MLAJ.

Latindex inclusion: `PENDIENTE_VERIFICAR`.

# Integrity note

Do not report any metric not present in `outputs/` or `paper/`.
